top_signals.title: Wall Street's 'fear gauge' punches back as the 'crash up' in chip stocks finally reverses
top_signals.summary: The monster rally in semiconductor stocks hit a wall on Friday, and the VIX at last caught up with other volatility metrics.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: How ‘Backrooms’ producer Peter Chernin thinks Hollywood needs to change
top_signals.summary: Franchise fatigue could drive an entertainment industry sea change as the appetite for fresh ideas grows and younger audiences make up more box office sales.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
